reason: Independently reviewed effect text is not executable until each operation has a tested engine implementation. Entries explicitly marked ambiguous must remain manual.
source: Two-pass visual transcription from authentic TTS card art

batches.scope: Sheets 10417-10422; verified at_any_time and named Clash-window Edge effects
batches.source: Direct visual transcription from authentic TTS card art

notation.discard_self: printed X token after the Edge arrow

10417:19.title: Managed Risk
10417:19.note: Card also has a separate After you Develop 1+ Edge that readies this card.

10417:23.title: Securities Portfolio
10417:23.printedText: At any time, gain 5 Capital for each Asset this Company controls. At any time, Price 3.

10418:5.title: Bribes
10418:5.printedText: At any time, choose 1 Support in the Council. Move it to a different Seat.

10418:23.title: Inner Circle
10418:23.printedText: At any time, if you control 2+ Seats, gain 2 Support.

10419:16.title: Psychological Operations
10419:16.printedText: At any time, change the Bases of X Support.
10419:16.note: X is chosen/resolved under the printed operation; no separate X cost is printed.

10419:19.title: Political Machine
10419:19.printedText: At any time, gain X Support.

10419:21.title: Integrated Networks
10419:21.printedText: At any time, gain X Margin equal to the number of Assets this Company controls.

10419:23.title: Embedded Source
10419:23.note: Card also has a separate Before Noise Edge: gain Immunity.

10420:0.title: Productivity
10420:0.printedText: At any time, Ready another Asset.

10420:4.title: Commodities Traders
10420:4.printedText: At any time, choose — pay 1 Food for 2 Carbon — or — pay 1 Carbon for 2 Food. After either, Exchange.

10420:14.title: Sutler Drilling
10420:14.printedText: At any time, gain X Carbon. At any time, Exchange.

10421:21.title: Ambersmelt
10421:21.printedText: At any time, gain X Carbon.

10422:5.title: Shell Companies
10422:5.printedText: At any time, choose a Company. It gains X Margin equal to the number of Negotiation you control.

10422:6.title: Transformation
10422:6.printedText: At any time, change the Bases of X Support you control.

10422:10.title: Backdoor
10422:10.printedText: During Focus, add 2 to a Clash.

10422:17.title: Satellite Network
10422:17.printedText: During Focus, add X to a Clash equal to the number of Technology you control.

10422:20.title: Wind Farm
10422:20.printedText: At any time, choose — gain 2 Margin — or — Research 1.

secondReview.method: Independent direct visual comparison of every entry against enlarged authentic card crops.
corrections: 10417:23 Securities Portfolio: its Price 3 ability prints Activate/turn sideways, not discard self.
10418:10 Liquidity: the X cost glyph is Influence; the same Influence glyph is printed with its name on other authentic cards such as Lattidor.
10419:19 Political Machine: the X cost glyph is Leader.

batches.reviewMethod: Direct visual transcription from authentic 680x950 TTS card crops. Words are authoritative only where status is verified. Unresolved printed icons are retained as bracketed tokens and make the entry ambiguous.

notation.[USE_PAIR]: two printed parenthesized Use target icons; precise types unresolved
notation.[RESOURCE_PAIR]: two printed resource icons; precise resource names unresolved
notation.[REMOVABLE_TRIPLE]: three slash-separated printed removable target icons; precise types unresolved
notation.[TARGET]: printed target-type icon whose glossary identity remains unresolved
notation.[COST_ICON]: printed activation-cost icon whose glossary identity remains unresolved

10423:1.title: Gascon Composites
10423:1.printedText: [EDGE]: During Focus, lose X [MARGIN]. Add X to a [CLASH].

10423:7.title: Xfab
10423:7.printedText: [EDGE], Develop X, Exhaust: At any time, gain 4X Capital.

10423:12.title: Bcom
10423:12.printedText: [EDGE], Exhaust: At any time, Ready 1 Propaganda.

10424:10.title: Another Way
10424:10.printedText: [EDGE]: During Focus, choose 1 State you control. It can contribute X Influence to the [CLASH] regardless of the [CLASH] type.

10424:14.title: Damning Evidence
10424:14.printedText: [EDGE]: Before a Political [CLASH] resolves, Remove all Focus Cards another Nation contributed.

10425:0.title: Interference
10425:0.printedText: [EDGE]: After an Action's cost is paid, Cancel it.

10425:3.title: Descent
10425:3.printedText: [EDGE], X [INFLUENCE]: At any time, Research X.

10425:6.title: Reconnaissance
10425:6.printedText: [EDGE]: During Focus, add 2 to a [CLASH] for each Region you occupy.

10425:13.title: Tip the Scales
10425:13.printedText: [EDGE]: Choose - At any time, Ready 1 card - or - During Focus, add 3 to a [CLASH].

10426:4.title: Hunt Down
10426:4.printedText: [EDGE]: During Focus, choose a Nation. Remove X Leaders they control. Research X.

10426:8.title: Make an Example
10426:8.printedText: [EDGE]: At any time, Remove 1 Leader. Educate 1.

10426:10.title: Undermined
10426:10.printedText: [EDGE]: After costs are paid for an Event, Cancel it. Gain 1 Corruption.

10426:12.title: Double Agents
10426:12.printedText: [EDGE]: After [CLASH] costs are paid, Cancel it. [EDGE]: After an Edge Action's costs are paid, Cancel it.

10426:20.title: Better Forecasts
10426:20.printedText: [EDGE], Develop X: At any time, Research X.

10426:22.title: Coverup
10426:22.printedText: [EDGE]: After costs are paid for an Event, Cancel it. Research 1.

10427:2.title: Erase
10427:2.printedText: [EDGE]: At any time, Remove 1 Company/Leader/Influence; Remove 1 Company/Leader/Influence; Remove 1 Company/Leader/Influence.

10427:3.title: Exaggeration
10427:3.printedText: [EDGE]: After Focus Cards are revealed, add 2 to a [CLASH].

10427:6.title: Intercept
10427:6.printedText: [EDGE], Develop X: After Campaign X costs are paid, Cancel it.

10427:9.title: Outwit
10427:9.printedText: [EDGE]: After costs are paid to Use [USE_PAIR], Cancel it. Educate 1.
ambiguities: Two parenthesized Use target icons are unresolved.

10427:10.title: Recalibrate
10427:10.printedText: [EDGE]: At any time, Ready 1 Propaganda. You may change the Base of 1 Support you control.

10427:11.title: Reconsideration
10427:11.printedText: [EDGE]: At any time, Research 1. Change the Bases of X Support you control.

10427:12.title: Scapegoat
10427:12.printedText: [EDGE], 1 [LEADER]: Before a [CLASH] resolves, ignore all Influence, Support, Margin, and Market that would be lost.

10427:13.title: Synergy
10427:13.printedText: [EDGE], Develop X: At any time, gain a total of X Food/Carbon.

10427:17.title: Roulette
10427:17.printedText: [EDGE], Develop X: During Focus, choose - Research X - or - Add X to a [CLASH].

10427:21.title: Forced Transfer
10427:21.printedText: [EDGE]: At any time, choose an Asset. Gain control of it and move it to a Company ignoring costs and requirements.

10428:2.title: Disappeared
10428:2.printedText: [EDGE]: At any time, Research 2. Remove up to 5 Leaders.

10428:4.title: Ousted
10428:4.printedText: [EDGE], Develop X: At any time, choose a Nation. Remove X Support they control from 1 Seat.

10428:10.title: Unregulated
10428:10.printedText: [EDGE], Exhaust: After Focus Cards are revealed, add 2 to a Corporate [CLASH].

10428:12.title: Cronyism
10428:12.printedText: [EDGE], Develop 5: At any time, choose a Company. It gains 1 Market.

10428:23.title: Divine Right
10428:23.printedText: [EDGE], 1 Support: During Focus, add 2 to a Military [CLASH].

secondReview.method: Independent direct comparison with authentic card art

scope.note: Human transcription from the authentic fixed-layout card art. Text is normalized only by spelling out printed icons in square brackets. No OCR text is treated as authority. Entries with ambiguous glyph semantics are not safe for automatic resolution.

abilities.printed: [EDGE], [ACTIVATE]: At any time, redistribute X Margin among Companies you control (min 0, max 9).
[EDGE], 1 [LEADER]: At any time, Research 2.
[EDGE], [ACTIVATE]: At any time, change the Bases of up to 2 Support.
[EDGE], [ACTIVATE]: At any time, change the Bases of up to 5 Support.
[EDGE], 1 Influence: At any time, Research 2.
[EDGE], X Influence, [ACTIVATE]: At any time, Research X.
[EDGE], Clash 1, [ACTIVATE]: At any time, Educate 1.
[EDGE], Clash 1, [ACTIVATE]: Clash. During Focus, add X to the Clash equal to your Corruption.
[EDGE], [ACTIVATE]: During Focus, add 3 to a Clash.
[EDGE], Clash 2: During Focus, add 3 to a Clash.
[EDGE], [ACTIVATE]: At any time, choose — Ready 1 card — or — Activate 1 card.
[EDGE], Clash X, [ACTIVATE]: At any time, Research X.
[EDGE], [ACTIVATE]: At any time, choose a Company you control. Set its Margin to 9. It gains 1 Market.
[EDGE], [ACTIVATE]: During Focus, Educate 1.
[EDGE], [ACTIVATE]: During Focus, Research 3, Develop 2.
[EDGE], [ACTIVATE]: After Focus Cards are revealed, add 1 additional Focus Card from your hand.
X Influence, [ACTIVATE]: At any time, a Company you control gains X Margin.
[EDGE], X Margin, [ACTIVATE]: Before a Clash, a State you control gains X Influence.
abilities.note: Recorded because it shares the card with the in-scope at-any-time ability; not eligible for the named timing set in this review.

abilities.printed: [EDGE], [ACTIVATE]: During Focus, add 2 to a Clash.
[EDGE], [ACTIVATE]: During Focus, add 6 to a Clash.
[EDGE], [ACTIVATE]: During Focus, reveal a Focus Card. Double its Focus Values.
[EDGE], Clash X, [ACTIVATE]: At any time, gain 5X Capital.
[EDGE], [ACTIVATE]: During Focus, add X to a Clash equal to the number of Leaders you control.
[EDGE], [ACTIVATE]: After you Clash (Political) or Campaign 1, Research 2.
abilities.note: Recorded because it shares the card with the in-scope at-any-time ability; not eligible for the named timing set in this review.

abilities.printed: [EDGE], Clash 4: At any time, gain 1 Support.
[EDGE], [ACTIVATE]: After Focus Cards are revealed, pay X ([RESOURCE_ICON_A]/[RESOURCE_ICON_B]/Influence) to add X to the Clash.
abilities.ambiguity: The first two payment icons have not been safely mapped to resource names; the third is Influence. Do not automate until the icon glossary mapping is independently verified.

abilities.printed: [EDGE], [ACTIVATE]: After Focus Cards are revealed, add 2 to a Clash.

review.method: Direct visual inspection of 1020x1425 crops from the authentic 3060x2850 sheets; every included card was read from art, not OCR.
review.automationBoundary: All entries are transcription-safe. This artifact does not assert that every operation already exists in the game engine.

secondReview.method: Independent comparison of every included ability against authentic 680x950 TTS card crops.
corrections: 10429:23 Greater Good: activation payment is X Influence, not X Support.
10430:8 Strongman: restored the printed Clash 1 activation payment.
10431:20 Hand-In-Hand first ability: payment is X Influence, not X Support.
10431:20 Hand-In-Hand second ability: payment is X Margin, not Clash X.
10433:6 Charisma: parenthesized Clash arena is Political, not Military.
10433:8 At Any Cost: removed the unsupported Capital/Carbon/Food mapping; two payment icons remain unresolved and the third is verified as Influence.
secondReview.automationBoundary: At Any Cost remains unsafe for automatic payment resolution. The other 26 ability transcriptions passed second review; engine support is a separate concern.
